hypothesis: A market-pullback resilience breakout shadow entry may surface replayable continuation candidates when SPY is in a short pullback but the ticker holds above its recent base and closes at a short-term high.
single_causal_variable: market-pullback resilience breakout shadow entry definition

shadow_entry_definition.data_granularity: daily OHLCV; no intraday bars used

production_promotion_reason: Shadow-only source audit. Requires stable multi-window forward returns and then real strategy replay with sizing, slot competition, and exits before any production change.
